channel.title: Freight Team on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at Home Depot on the Freight Team: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: Everything you need to know about working as a Home Depot freight team associate, including pay, overnight schedule, pros, cons, and tips.
